purpose: Tracks session state snapshots across flow implementations from FLOW-25 through FLOW-35. Contains historical session states, artifact counts, flow registries, DNA compliance checks, and recovery instructions.

sections.name: Header + Implementation Update
sections.description: File header identifies as Post FLOW-34 consolidated. Has implementation update header already added.
sections.checkMethod: Verify header update notes are accurate against actual codebase

sections.name: Consolidated System State (Post FLOW-34)
sections.description: Artifact counts, next available numbers, flow registry through FLOW-34, FLOW-33 and 33 details, fabric interfaces, DNA patterns. This was the design-phase endpoint.
sections.checkMethod: Compare artifact counts against actual. Verify flow registry includes correct T-ranges. Check fabric interfaces match actual 6+SECRETS. DNA patterns should show 9, not 6.
subChecks: Artifact counts table at line 32 — still shows design numbers
Next Available Numbers at line 48 — still shows F1484/T565/CF-789/SK-403
Flow Registry at line 63 — stops at FLOW-34, needs FLOW-35..45
Fabric interfaces at line 142 — shows 6, needs SECRETS fabric
DNA patterns at line 153 — shows 6, needs DNA-7/8/9

sections.name: FLOW-34 Details
sections.description: FLOW-34 artifact summary, factory map, families, complements, core mission, research sources, DNA compliance. This is design-phase content for Skill Multi-Target Translation.
sections.checkMethod: Verify against actual FLOW-34 implementation if it exists in codebase. FLOW-34 is marketplace-plugin-adapter.

sections.name: Historical Session States (FLOW-25 through FLOW-31)
sections.description: Historical snapshots from each flow session. Contains per-flow artifact summaries, renumbering tables, backward compatibility checks, save points. These are HISTORICAL records and should NOT be modified in body — only add notes if design-phase data conflicts with actual.
sections.checkMethod: Verify these are genuinely historical. Add note at top of section indicating these are design-phase snapshots. No body modifications needed.

sections.name: FLOW-32 Session State
sections.description: FLOW-32 artifact contribution (20 services, T516-T535), DNA compliance, consolidated state post-34.
sections.checkMethod: Verify T-range matches actual contracts. Verify service count matches actual directory.

sections.name: Phase 8 Translation Corrections
sections.description: SK numbering corrections, Python base fabric library (SK-379..394), React Native UI skills (SK-395..401), AF station wiring.
sections.checkMethod: This was Python-specific. Add note that NestJS implementation uses different SK numbering (SK-416+).

sections.name: FLOW-35 Session State
sections.description: FLOW-35 details (Secrets Fabric + ConfigBuilder + Grok). System state post-35, factory map, fabric interfaces (7 post-35), SDK audit, DNA compliance.
sections.checkMethod: Verify SECRETS fabric is correctly documented. Check if actual code has 6 or 7 fabrics. This was the last design-phase flow.

sections.name: MISSING: FLOW-36..45 Session States
sections.description: Document stops at FLOW-35. Flows 36-45 were implemented in NestJS and have no session state entries here.
sections.checkMethod: Add session state summary for FLOW-36..45 with actual implementation data.
